zh.lifeSummary: 當Gillespick de Cambrun - Second Chief of Clan Cameron於1030年出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親Sinill Douglas Cameron 1st Chief of Clan Cameron, Mormaer, Dubacan of Angus18歲，母親Marion MacKenneth26歲。他至少有2個兒子。他去世於1099年在英國蘇格蘭享年69歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Cambrun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish (Cambrón): habitational name from any of several places in the provinces of Cáceres and Murcia called Cambrón.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Somme and Aisne called Cambron. Alternatively, from a diminutive of c(h)ambre ‘room’ (see Cambre ).

variants.name: Cameron
meanings: in the Highlands, it is usually a nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + sròn ‘nose’.
in the Lowlands it is also a habitational name from any of various places called Cameron, especially in Fife.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gillespick de Cambrun - Second Chief of Clan Cameron was born in 1030, in Scotland, his father, Sinill Douglas Cameron 1st Chief of Clan Cameron, Mormaer, Dubacan of Angus, was 18 and his mother, Marion MacKenneth, was 26. He had at least 2 sons. He died in 1099, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gillespick de Cambrun - Second Chief of Clan Cameron est né en 1030, à Écosse, son père, Sinill Douglas Cameron 1st Chief of Clan Cameron, Mormaer, Dubacan of Angus, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Marion MacKenneth, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1099, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gillespick de Cambrun - Second Chief of Clan Cameron 1030 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sinill Douglas Cameron 1st Chief of Clan Cameron, Mormaer, Dubacan of Angus 18 und seine Mutter Marion MacKenneth 26. Er hatte mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1099 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1099, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ko.lifeSummary: Gillespick de Cambrun - Second Chief of Clan Cameron(이)가 1030년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sinill Douglas Cameron 1st Chief of Clan Cameron, Mormaer, Dubacan of Angus(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Marion MacKenneth(은)는 26세였다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1099년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gillespick de Cambrun - Second Chief of Clan Cameron родился в 1030 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sinill Douglas Cameron 1st Chief of Clan Cameron, Mormaer, Dubacan of Angus было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion MacKenneth, 26. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1099 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.
